source.sourcePath: raw/sources/DHF (인허가)/06_(Retrofit) HnX-R1/05_설계개발 검증 및 유효성 확인/10_Performance/[H&abyz] HnVUE Software Validation Test Kit(Ver.0.0.1).xlsx

document.title: [H&abyz] HnVUE Software Validation Test Kit
document.documentType: Software validation test kit / validation test cases

sourceSummary.oneLine: HnVUE software validation test kit covering setup, detector configurations, account/license behavior, DICOM networking, imaging workflow, and test results.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supports design development verification and validation evidence for HnVUE software performance and integration testing.
keyPoints: Setup prerequisites include administrator installation, Microsoft.NET/Vcredist installation, DEP setting, virtual memory, Ethernet IP, LAN power settings, display resolution, and detector preparation.
Configured integrations include PACS, Worklist/MWL, Dicom Printer, Bunny, and UBPACS using specified AE titles, IP addresses, and ports.
Detector test cases cover 1D and 2D acquisition settings, preview acquisition, continuous exposure, Ready status, and DICOM model-name tag verification.
System test cases report totals of 91 STC test cases: PASS 73, FAIL 15, N/A 2, Pending 5.

Failed or pending items include automatic DB backup, generator UI activation, import after storage path restore, non-English overlay display, duplicate accession handling, crop/marker persistence, annotation persistence, and viewer non-English patient-name display.

entities.name: DICOM
entities.evidence: 획득영상 dicom 정보 내, 각 디텍터 모델명 정보 tag 에 정상 삽입 여부 확인

concepts.name: Detector acquisition configuration
concepts.evidence: Detector Tab 에서 Stand Detector HAD1717MC 만 선택

concepts.name: MWL query testing
concepts.evidence: HnVUE Worklist > ALL > 3days > 돋보기 클릭 > 해당 환자목록 쿼리 여부 확인

concepts.name: Database backup and restore
concepts.evidence: Backup > Manual Backup > Yesterday 선택 > 백업 후 C:\HnVUE 내 날짜별 BackUP 폴더 생성여부 확인

concepts.name: RIS Code mapping and blocking
concepts.evidence: Setting > RIS Code > Edit > Load Worklist 클릭

evidence.claim: The document is a HnVUE software validation test kit with version 0.0.1.
evidence.evidenceText: [H&abyz] HnVUE Software Validation Test Kit(Ver.0.0.1).xlsx

evidence.claim: The validation kit includes setup steps for HnVUE installation and prerequisites.
evidence.evidenceText: HnVUE 설치파일 관리자 권한 실행; Vcredist.exe, Microsoft.NET 정상설치 확인

evidence.claim: The setup section specifies Ethernet IP settings for MCW Station AP, MCW Inside AP, and MC Wired configurations.
Detector preparation includes 1717MC, 1417MCW, and 1717MCW detector/accessory models.
evidence.evidenceText: Detector 및 악세서리 모델별 준비; 1717MC (2대), 1417MCW(1대), 1717MCW(1대)

evidence.claim: HnVUE login testing includes dongle-based admin login and demo login without dongle.
evidence.evidenceText: 동글키 삽입 후 admin / admin 입력 후 Log in; 동글키 없이 demo / 0001 입력 후 로그인 시도 (데모버전)

evidence.claim: The document requires checking HnVUE and HnVUE VET software version information from the UI.
evidence.evidenceText: HnVUE/HnVUE VET Software 버전정보 확인

evidence.claim: PACS setup testing uses Local AE Title HnVUE, Remote AE Title Storage_test, IP 127.0.0.1, and port 3000.
evidence.evidenceText: Local AE Title : HnVUE; Remote AE Title : Storage_test; Remote IP Address : 127.0.0.1; Remote Port : 3000

evidence.claim: Worklist setup testing uses Local AE Title HnVUE, Remote AE Title MWL_test, IP 127.0.0.1, and port 3000.
evidence.evidenceText: Local AE Title : HnVUE; Remote AE Title : MWL_test; Remote IP Address : 127.0.0.1; Remote Port : 3000

evidence.claim: DICOM printer setup testing uses Local AE Title HnVUE, Remote AE Title Printer_test, IP 127.0.0.1, and port 3000.
evidence.evidenceText: Setting > Dicom Printer > Add 클릭 후 정보입력; Local AE Title : HnVUE; Remote AE Title : Printer_test

evidence.claim: UBPACS PACS integration uses Remote AE Title UBPACS, IP 10.20.6.133, and port 104.
evidence.evidenceText: Remote AE Title : UBPACS; Remote IP Address : 10.20.6.133; Remote Port : 104

evidence.claim: UBPACS Worklist integration uses Remote AE Title UBPACS1, IP 10.20.6.133, and port 10004.
evidence.evidenceText: Remote AE Title : UBPACS1; Remote IP Address : 10.20.6.133; Remote Port : 10004

evidence.claim: Manual database backup validation checks for dated BackUP folders and backup files under C:\HnVUE.
evidence.evidenceText: Backup > Manual Backup > Yesterday 선택 > 백업 후 C:\HnVUE 내 날짜별 BackUP 폴더 생성여부 확인

evidence.claim: Detector acquisition tests verify DICOM tag (0008,1090) for detector model name.
evidence.evidenceText: 획득영상 dicom 정보 내, 각 디텍터 모델명 정보 tag 에 정상 삽입 여부 확인 : 우하단 Tool > Information 모양 > (0008,1090) 모델명 확인

evidence.claim: The STC summary reports 91 test cases with 73 PASS, 15 FAIL, 2 N/A, and 5 Pending.
evidence.evidenceText: STC Test case,91; PASS,73; FAIL,15; N/A,2; Pending,5

evidence.claim: Automatic DB backup failed because automatic DB backup did not operate.
evidence.evidenceText: STC-18...DB 백업 기능,FAIL...자동 DB Backup 동작안함

evidence.claim: Generator integration validation failed because the generator console was active even when manufacturer was None.
evidence.evidenceText: STC-22...제너레이터 연동 툴 활성화 확인,FAIL...None 이어도 제너레이터 콘솔 활성화 됨

evidence.claim: Import after restoring the image storage path failed due to an import error for previously acquired images.
evidence.evidenceText: STC-38...영상저장경로 변경 > 원상복구 후 import,FAIL...저장경로 변경 후, 기 획득영상 영상 import 오류

evidence.claim: Non-English patient names failed to display correctly in overlay for Thai input.
evidence.evidenceText: STC-53...Character Set 정상동작여부,FAIL...영어 외, 다른 언어 환자이름 Overlay 상 ??? 로 표기 됨

evidence.claim: Duplicate accession number handling was not improved for manual worklist registration.
evidence.evidenceText: STC-66...동일 Acc No 의 검사 생성 불가,FAIL...아직 미개선 상태

evidence.claim: Crop and marker persistence failed due to position or shape shifting or clearing during repeated thumbnail selection.
evidence.evidenceText: STC-70...Crop 기능 동작성 확인,FAIL...Crop / Marker 적용 위치/모양 미세하게 이동하거나 풀리는 현상

evidence.claim: Annotation persistence failed due to annotation position, shape, or values shifting or clearing.
evidence.evidenceText: STC-78...Annotation 동작성 확인,FAIL...Annotation 적용 위치/모양 미세하게 이동하거나 풀리거나 수치 값 틀어지는 현상

reviewFlags.reason: Document date is not present; validation date columns are present but blank in the extracted text.
Authority signal is FDA in metadata, but the source text does not explicitly identify FDA, a jurisdiction, or a regulatory submission status.
Revision/version is inferred from the source filename as Ver.0.0.1, not from an internal document control field in the extracted text.
Some extracted spreadsheet text contains OCR or preprocessing artifacts and typographical errors, such as leading stray characters and inconsistent spellings.
Product family HnX is present in metadata and path, while the source text primarily identifies HnVUE, HnVUE VET, and detector models.
